facebook.caption: Your adventure to Hon Thom Island starts right here. The Hon Thom Departure Terminal at Bãi Đất Đỏ is more than just a cable car station. Inspired by Ancient Rome, it is a grand, photogenic complex where you can shop, grab a bite, and soak in the atmosphere before boarding the world-famous gondola across the sea. On the other side waits the massive water park at Sun World Hon Thom Nature Park. Rated 4.5 out of 5 from over 15,000 reviews, this place consistently impresses visitors. Tip: arrive early in the morning to beat the crowds and get the clearest views from the cable car.

instagram.caption: Ancient Rome meets the South China Sea. The Hon Thom Departure Terminal at Bãi Đất Đỏ is your dramatic gateway to an island water park, with one of the world's longest sea cable car rides in between. Rated 4.5/5 by over 15,000 visitors. Go early for the best experience.

tiktok.caption: A Roman-inspired cable car terminal in Vietnam?? Sun World Hon Thom is wild 🌊 #PhuQuoc #HonThom #VietnamTravel #SunWorld
